name: racon-comissoes
author: Victor Cauã Botelho Generoso da Silva

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix server install --include=dev && npm --prefix client install --include=dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
